data.title: Correction: Corbion announces quarterly sales of € 293.7m and Adjusted EBITDA of € 37.8m; maintains full-year outlook
data.description: Amsterdam-based sustainable ingredients company, Corbion, known for its focus on preservation through scientific applications, has released its Q1 2026 results ending on March 31. In Q1 2026, the company reported a -4.1% organic sales growth, with volume/mix down by -2.6% and prices by -1.5%. Total sales for the quarter stood at €293.7 million, while adjusted EBITDA was reported at €37.8 million and operating profit at €14.7 million. Looking ahead to the full year of 2026, the company has affirmed its outlook. For Q1 2026, the total growth was noted at €293.7 million, while organic growth remained unchanged. More details on this news are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: One Heung Kong Teams Up with Guangdong Fashion Week to Empower Chinese Original Design to Go Global
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on April 22, 2026, the 37th Guangdong Fashion Week Spring Session commenced at Wanbo. Running from April 17 to 24, the event featured the One Heung Kong Fashion Art Haute Couture Show as its standout artistic presentation, garnering praise from viewers with its world-class designs.

data.title: OpenAI's GPT Image 2 Is Now Available on Pollo AI
data.description: In Singapore on April 22, 2026, Pollo AI made a significant announcement about the launch of OpenAI's GPT Image 2 on its platform. This update provides creators, marketers, and businesses with access to a more advanced image model for tasks requiring precision. Not only does this release offer a higher quality performance, but it also enhances accuracy and efficiency for users.

data.title: Global Truck Loader Crane Market Set to Reach USD 4.5 Billion by 2035 as Smart Lifting Solutions Gain Momentum Across Construction and Logistics
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a recent study conducted by Future Market Insights revealed that the global market for truck loader cranes is on a consistent growth path. The increase in demand for material handling solutions that are efficient, versatile, and prioritize safety is fueling this growth. Key numbers in this trend include a significant rise in market demand and a noticeable shift towards innovative solutions for handling materials.
